name: Layered Tamale Pie with Corn, Tomatoes & Cheese
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Jalapeno, seeded and finely chopped
1 cup Shredded low fat cheddar cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain liquid from beans, reserving 1/4 cup. In a large skillet heat reserved bean liquid to a boil over medium heat.
2. Add onion, garlic, green pepper, carrots, jalapeno, oregano and cumin. Cover and cook, stirring occasionally, until vegetables are tender and liquid is absorbed (about 10 minutes).
3. Add drained beans, corn and tomatoes; cook uncovered, stirring occasionally, for about 15 minutes or until thickened.
4. Preheat oven to 350°F. In a 2-quart saucepan, heat water, cornmeal and black pepper to boiling, stirring constantly.
5. Cook for 5 minutes until well thickened.
6. Pour half of the bean mixture into an 11-inch round baking dish, spreading evenly around the bottom of the dish.
7. Spread half of the cornmeal mixture evenly over the bean mixture.
8. Sprinkle with half of the cheese. Repeat layering.
9. Bake for 35 minutes or until bubbly and brown. Cool for 10 minutes before serving.
